label: AI Tool-Calling Chat Route
summary: Use when a Next.js App Router project needs a streamed chat endpoint where the Vercel AI SDK can call server-side tools, return structured tool results, and automatically continue the assistant turn for multiple tool-call roundtrips. Pair with an existing chat UI that can render AI SDK UI message parts.

envVars.purpose: Authenticates the OpenAI provider used by the chat route. Create an API key in the OpenAI dashboard and expose it only to the server runtime.

notes: Only the App Router API route is kept (legacy client components mixed AI SDK majors / missing template files). Route lives at /api/assistant so it never collides with openai-chat's verbatim /api/chat. REWRITABLE (Codex P1 PR #430): the whole point is replacing the demo tools with project tools, which verbatim-policy would revert — instructions.md carries the must-keep contract (key guard, zod schemas, step limit). lastVerified = legacy source date until first preview-test.
